title: What version of E of E is this
display_title: What version of E of E is this
wikitext:
[]: What version of E of E is this?             Quote Post by ~at0mic punk~ » Wed Jan 30, 2008 9:56 pm Is this from Revival, because it looks better then the one the original End of Eva. (It's an AMV, the footage used is that I'm talking about) http://youtube.com/watch?v=EtEi-hUx_0c

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 30, 2008 10:03 pm You mean the first clip? That's certainly not EoTV or EoE. Perhaps it's an Asuka mindfuck from Rebuild. Either way, this should be in the Rebuild room, just in case.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Jan 30, 2008 10:08 pm That's the Asuka "Mind-rape" sequence from the Director's Cut of Episode 22

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 30, 2008 10:24 pm Fuck, I don't have that...

[]:             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Thu Jan 31, 2008 4:01 am Oooh. Yeah. Why don't I remember her walking around by herself though? For some reason I only remembered it when the crowd showed up. o_o But it did look shinier than I recall, for some reason. XD

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jan 31, 2008 5:23 am AsukaChan wrote: Oooh. Yeah. Why don't I remember her walking around by herself though? For some reason I only remembered it when the crowd showed up. o_o But it did look shinier than I recall, for some reason. XD
